allow: Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "$pids = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess; foreach\($p in $pids\){ Write-Host ""Killing PID $p""; Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep 2; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table")
